name: Syft SBOM Generator
description: Installs Syft and provides helpers for generating SBOMs (CycloneDX/SPDX) from the container filesystem

syftVersion.description: Syft version to install (e.g. 1.18.0 or latest)

defaultFormat.description: Default SBOM output format (cyclonedx-json, spdx-json, syft-json, text)
